title: ayapana haughtii
intro: Ayapana haughtii, also known as Eclipta alba or Horseheal, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Ayapana haughtii include its ability to promote hair growth, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a tincture, allowing for easy consumption of its medicinal properties.
